queries.question: Distinct patient ids with any lab result.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN lab_results l ON l.appointment_id = a.appointment_id

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a 'critical' lab result.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN lab_results l ON l.appointment_id = a.appointment_id WHERE l.result_flag = 'critical'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a 'critical' glucose result.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN lab_results l ON l.appointment_id = a.appointment_id WHERE l.result_flag = 'critical' AND l.test_name = 'glucose'

queries.question: Distinct customer ids that bought anything.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id

queries.question: Distinct customer ids that bought a electronics product.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'electronics'

queries.question: Distinct customer ids that bought a electronics product in quantity 3 or more.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'electronics' AND oi.quantity >= 3

queries.question: Distinct customer ids with a delivered order containing a electronics product in quantity 3 or more.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.customer_id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'electronics' AND oi.quantity >= 3 AND o.order_status = 'delivered'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with any prescription.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id

queries.question: Distinct patient ids prescribed a antibiotic medication.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN medications m ON pr.medication_id = m.medication_id WHERE m.medication_class = 'antibiotic'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids prescribed a antibiotic medication with refills allowed.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.patient_id FROM appointments a JOIN prescriptions pr ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN medications m ON pr.medication_id = m.medication_id WHERE m.medication_class = 'antibiotic' AND pr.refill_allowed = 'yes'

queries.question: Distinct sales order ids containing a Bikes product.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.SalesOrderID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID WHERE c.Name = 'Bikes'

queries.question: Distinct sales order ids with a Bikes line of quantity 5 or more.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.SalesOrderID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID WHERE c.Name = 'Bikes' AND d.OrderQty >= 5

queries.question: Distinct sales order ids containing a Components product.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.SalesOrderID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID WHERE c.Name = 'Components'

queries.question: Distinct sales order ids with a Components line of quantity 10 or more.

queries.question: Distinct sales order ids containing a Red product.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.SalesOrderID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE p.Color = 'Red'

queries.question: Distinct sales order ids with a Red line priced above 1000.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.SalesOrderID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE p.Color = 'Red' AND d.UnitPrice > 1000
